# rafay99.com

> Personal portfolio and blog of Mohammad Abdul Rafay, Senior Full Stack Developer based in Islamabad, Pakistan.

## About

Mohammad Abdul Rafay is a Senior Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience building production SaaS platforms, cross-platform mobile apps, and AI-integrated systems. Currently architecting TudoNum at Tudo Tech Lab — a multi-service super app with a Python/Django backend and React frontend spanning professional services, ride-hailing, logistics, and deliveries.

## Core Expertise

- Full-stack SaaS development with React, Next.js, Django, and Convex
- Cross-platform mobile development with React Native, Expo, and Flutter
- AI/LLM integration with Claude SDK, OpenAI, OpenRouter, and TensorFlow
- Cloud infrastructure on AWS and Vercel with CI/CD and zero-downtime deployments
- Multi-region payment integration with Stripe and local gateways

## Flagship Projects

- Wryte (wryte.xyz): Collaborative Markdown editor with custom GitHub-to-Convex sync engine and AI writing assistance
- Ourtrail (ourtrail.xyz): Cross-platform trip memory platform with shared albums across web and React Native mobile
- Env Pilot (envpilot.dev): Environment variable management SaaS with VS Code extension, CLI, and WorkOS Vault encryption
- Lumo (lumocash.com): Financial tracking app for iOS/Android with AI receipt scanning and budget cycle management
- TudoNum (tudonum.app): Multi-service super app with schema-driven form engine, multi-tier RBAC, and multi-region payments

## Open Source Contributions

- Mole (tw93/Mole, 51k+ stars): Merged PR #755 adding --list flag to mo uninstall with 12 bats test cases
- TLDR Pages: 5 merged PRs (#9889, #9890, #10604, #10609, #10628) adding platform pages and improving CLI documentation
- TinaCMS: Filed reproducible bug reports against complex subsystems

## Blog

Over 80 published technical articles covering software engineering, AI/LLM development, cloud architecture, mobile development, and open source.
